Bullet Point 4: DELICIOUS FLAVORS: From enhanced waters and sports drinks to iced teas and energy drinks, Cirkul has beverage options for everyone.

Zero-calorie, no-sugar claims may appeal to health-conscious buyers, but lack of certifications limits perceived premium quality.
